stemHtml: When the term "CAVOK" is used in an aviation routine weather report (METAR), what are the values of visibility and cloud?

options.a: Visibility more than 8 km, no cloud below 3000 feet.
options.b: Visibility 10 km or more, no cloud below 1500 feet.
options.c: Visibility 10 km or more, no cloud below 5000 feet.
options.d: Visibility more than 5000 m, no cloud below 1500 feet.
